Normal Heights Brewery

Home | Locations | Adams Ave.

CALL IN ORDERS: (619) 847-4628

3514 Adams Ave, San Diego, CA 92116

Come visit our tap room in Adams Ave. San Diego and discover our large selection of craft beers.

Tuesday 1:00 pm - 9:00 pm
Wednesday 1:00 pm - 9:00 pm
Thursday 1:00 pm - 9:00 pm
Friday 12:00 pm - 10:00 pm
Saturday 12:00 pm - 10:00 pm
Sunday 12:00 pm - 7:00 pm
